ocr.text: In the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, Nippon Yusen reported a total rail network utilization of 1,200,000 tonnes, reflecting
significant metrics across various performance indicators. The total revenue generated during this period amounted to CHF
75M, showcasing a year-over-year change of 15.2%, which indicates robust growth within a competitive market landscape.
This growth is underscored by a market share of 22.5%, positioning Nippon Yusen favorably against its competitors.
Operational costs per tonne were recorded at CHF 75, which, when analyzed with the efficiency ratio of 15.3%, highlights the
company's operational effectiveness in managing its logistics and transportation services. The profit margin achieved during this
period stands at 22.5%, further emphasizing the financial health and strategic positioning of Nippon Yusen within the European
rail transport sector. The combination of these metrics suggests not only a commendable performance in terms of volume but
also an effective cost management strategy which has facilitated a strong profit margin, ensuring that the company remains
competitive while delivering substantial value to its stakeholders. Overall, the figures reflect a successful quarter, characterized
by strategic growth and enhanced operational efficiency, contributing positively to Nippon Yusen's long-term objectives in the
